title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at ISRO Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at ISRO Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
ISRO Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ISRO Advisory Limited:
ISRO Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO Advisory Limited!
